title: StatBasedMons
description: Match the speed of rideable Pokémon to their base Speed stat
body:
# Change the speed of your Pokemons
This data pack sets every Pokémon’s Speed to its base Speed stat and includes several other edits
### Other changes : 
- Dragonite is a bird 
- Salamence is a jet
- Blastoise have more stamina in air
